name: Zhang Heng
page_title: Zhang Heng 張橫 [Han Sui] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: One of Han Sui’s Eight Knights.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	張橫


	 Simplified Chinese 
	张横


	 Wade-Giles 
	Chang Hêng

	 Other Names 
	Chang Heng, Zhang Han

	 Name Notes 
	For some reason poor Zhang Heng is listed incorrectly in several sources. Some Chinese versions of the novel have him as ‘長橫’ (‘長’ chang2 instead of ‘張’ zhang1). As if that isn’t enough, some Brewitt-Taylor translations list him as Zhang Han—no idea why.

full_text:
Zhang Heng 張橫
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Heng (張橫). One of Han Sui’s Eight Knights. Zhang Heng was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty.
